title: Pilosocereus arenicola
taxonomy: Pilosocereus arenicola is classified within the family Cactaceae, commonly known as cacti. This classification places it within the order Caryophyllales, a large group of flowering plants. The genus Pilosocereus is a group of cacti that are native to the Americas, with Pilosocereus arenicola being a specific species within this group. Pilosocereus arenicola is further classified as a species of the subgenus Pilosocereus. This species is found in the tropical regions of Central and South America.
